67511.title: Bargain Hunt : Hemswell 28
67511.description: Anita Manning presents from Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire with experts Christina Trevanion and Nick Hall. There is magic in the air as a magician and his assistant take on a mother and daughter to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction.
